spelling_variation_notes: Intentional spelling variation: Nahuatl paleographic pages use colonial forms (e.g. Moquiuix without accent); Spanish translation pages use modern forms (e.g. Moquíhuix). Do not standardize across sections. Confirmed both-runs-wrong: unoaconejaron → aconsejaron (line-break merge error).
